overview: A fun 5-reel ICP slot machine where players sign in with Internet Identity, bet on up to 9 paylines at 0.01 ICP per line, win prizes paid instantly to their account, and the first user becomes admin with control of the house balance.
features: 5-reel × 3-row slot machine with 8 classic symbols and animated spinning reels
Up to 9 paylines with selectable line bets (1, 3, 5, or 9 lines)
Internet Identity sign-in with per-user ICP account provisioning
0.01 ICP per active payline with instant prize payouts to player accounts
98% payback rate with 2% house edge retained in the backend
Player wallet with balance display and ICP transfers to external addresses
Admin panel for the first user with house balance control and transfers
Multi-line win evaluation with payline overlays and celebration animations
